name: neural-weights-en-us
model_lineage: v3.8.5-latam-8k (v385) — init_from v381 (the shipped 6.5.0), ONE folded change: a dedicated `overture-latam` corpus shard (CA 299,809 + MX 156,421 Overture-Addresses rows, weight 6.0) added to `country_weights` (+CA, +MX) — the FIRST genuinely-new locale coverage. 2k probe → 8k resume, LR 1.0e-5 constant. Tokenizer v0.9.0-multisplice (73,143) UNCHANGED; every lexicon UNCHANGED; architecture identical. Weights-only vs 6.5.0.
phase: PROMOTED (6.6.0, shipped as npm 7.1.0) — v385: the CA/MX Overture locale add, init_from v381. The model now parses Mexican addresses (Spanish city surfaces, Privada/Calle streets) meaningfully better than shipped: MX locality +8.7 (74.0→82.7, native-order held-out board); CA neutral (US-order, already parsed — coverage-provenance, ships free). Gated on v6.0.0-shipped-baseline + the golden 2pp gate (PASS: 0 tags >2pp below shipped v381; the one nick is country −1.6, small-N 220/245, sub-threshold and stated) + the Gauntlet (PASS 33/33; identical known-xfail profile to v381). Weights-only: no lexicon, inference, or browser change from 6.5.0. BR dropped this cycle (Overture rows are country-implicit → dilute country emission −5.3pp; fix = the countryAppendFraction intl-render, tracked for v7.2).

training.corpus_version: v0.13.0-latam overlay (v0.11.0-no-fragment base + a 456,230-row `overture-latam` shard: CA 299,809 + MX 156,421 Overture-Addresses rows) — the dedicated LATAM source does NOT dilute the trained EU `overture` rows
training.recipe: v3.8.5-latam-8k.yaml — init_from v381 step-8000, LR 1.0e-5 constant, 8k (2k probe → 8k resume); the ONE-at-a-time addition over 6.5.0 is the `overture-latam` CA/MX shard at weight 6.0 with +CA/+MX in country_weights.
training.tokenizer_splice: tokenizer_splice.py build-tokenizer --locales fr --per-file-cap 2000000 over OA fr/countrywide.csv (seed 42, 350k-line corpus, unigram vocab 24000) -> splice 2406 non-ASCII FR pieces into v0.7.1-nsplice (English byte-identity asserted). UNCHANGED from v240 (md5 04995524). The v241 delta over v240 is that the new embedding rows now receive GRADIENT via the init_from fine-tune, not just FVT mean-init.
data_attribution: Overture Maps Foundation — Addresses theme (CDLA-Permissive-2.0): the `overture-latam` CA/MX training shard (456,230 rows) NEW in 6.6.0. Attribution-only, not share-alike.

BAN — Base Adresse Nationale (DINUM / IGN, Licence Ouverte 2.0): the `synth-fr-fragment` training shard (144,865 rows) NEW in 6.4.0, and the FR fragment eval board. Street surfaces are disjoint between the two.
OpenAddresses CZ — ČÚZK RÚIAN (CC-BY 4.0): tokenizer-splice training text + the oa-cz coord eval sets
OpenAddresses PL — GUGiK / PRG (public, BDOT-derived): tokenizer-splice training text + the oa-pl coord eval sets
OpenAddresses SK — MINV/ZBGIS (CC-0/CC-BY per OA source): oa-sk coord eval set (free-rider validation)
OpenAddresses SI — GURS (CC-BY per OA source): oa-si coord eval set (free-rider validation)
See THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md for the standing OpenAddresses / GeoNames / WOF attribution.

architecture.params: ~29M (6-layer/384-hidden encoder + 73,143-piece multisplice embedding; init_from v264, 8k fine-tune w/ a non-exported span-boundary aux head)

requires.$comment: The SHIP-CONFIG this model was TRAINED against (#718). v263 adds `country` (the #1104 dedicated country soft-feed channel) to the prior anchor+gazetteer+conventions config. The canonical ProductionScorer (@mailwoman/neural's createScorer) reads this and FAILS CLOSED if a required channel isn't actually fed — closing the #566/#685 trap where a channel-trained model scored channel-OFF silently goes OOD. The server tier feeds anchor+gazetteer+country; the pocket tier is anchor-only (its capabilities country=0 by construction). Additive metadata only.

notes: v3.8.5-latam-8k (v385), shipped as npm 7.1.0. ONE folded change over 6.5.0: a dedicated `overture-latam` shard (CA 299,809 + MX 156,421 Overture-Addresses rows, weight 6.0) with +CA/+MX in country_weights — the first genuinely-new locale coverage in the arc. THE WIN: MX locality +8.7 (74.0→82.7 on the native-order held-out board) — the model now reads 'Calle Zeverino León 749, 28809 Manzanillo' and places Manzanillo correctly instead of guessing. CA is neutral (Canadian addresses look American; v381 already parsed them — adds coverage-provenance, ships free). Golden 2pp gate PASS: 0 tags >2pp below shipped v381; the one nick is country −1.6 (220 vs 224 / 245, small-N, sub-threshold — the #1104 country channel reacting to the new CA/MX surfaces). Gauntlet PASS 33/33, identical known-xfail profile to v381 (the FR 'Rue du Chevaleret' #1101 xfail persists). Weights-only — no lexicon, inference, or browser change from 6.5.0. KNOWN OPEN: BR was dropped this cycle — Overture rows are country-implicit (0% carry a country token), so training on 666k of them dilutes country emission (−5.3pp, fails the gate); the fix is a countryAppendFraction intl-render on the Overture adapter (tracked for v7.2). CALIBRATION: the isotonic tables carry from the v5.3.0 lineage; opt-in, default output unaffected; re-fit is a tracked follow-up.

format.model: ONNX int8 dynamic (quantized from fp32, opset 17)
format.tokenizer: SentencePiece unigram, byte_fallback=true, vocab_size=73143 (v0.9.0-multisplice; ships WITH the model, both runtimes load it from this bundle)

calibration.method: isotonic-regression (PAVA) over per-span softmax confidence; OPT-IN via core/decoder createCalibrator
calibration.note: RE-FIT on v5.3.0 (2026-07-04): calibration.json + calibration-per-locale.json are now fitted on THIS model's confidence distribution (35,600 spans over the 8k held-out set), not carried from v4.x. The from-scratch model was under-confident (meanConf 0.913 vs acc 0.980, gap -0.067); the fit corrects held-out OA ECE 0.0698→0.0017 (overall 0.0677→0.0028, per-locale NL 0.166→0.000 / DE 0.114→0.003). Reproduce: collect-span-confidences.ts → fit-isotonic-calibration.py --model-version 5.3.0. Apply via @mailwoman/core/decoder's createCalibrator; default parse output is byte-stable when omitted.

base_relpath: models/quantized/model-v385-latam8k-int8.onnx under $MAILWOMAN_DATA_ROOT; training output on Modal volume mailwoman-training:/output-v384-latam-probe-s42/checkpoints/step-008000

eval.gate_2026_07_18_v710_camx: v6.0.0-shipped-baseline gate + golden 2pp gate (v385 vs shipped v381, channels-on, same run): PASS. Golden: exact-match 24.2% (1105 vs 1104, +1 row), country 89.8 vs 91.4 (−1.6, small-N 220/245, sub-threshold — the only mover >0.5pp down), region 78.1 vs 78.6 (−0.5), locality/postcode/street/house_number flat. NO tag >2pp down. Native-order held-out board: MX locality 74.0→82.7 (+8.7), CA neutral. Gauntlet (eval gauntlet --candidate): regression 33/33 PASS; metamorphic INV 62/63, DIR 3/3, BAND 16/21 — identical known-xfail profile to shipped v381 (the 1 INV[comma-drop] xfail is the pre-existing FR #1101 case; US comma-drop held). No new regression. Grade: docs/articles/evals/2026-07-18-v710-camx-latam-grade.md.
eval.gate_2026_07_17_v650_punct_digit: v6.0.0-shipped-baseline gate: PASS, 0 tags >2pp below shipped v310, +2.3pp us.country_homograph_f1 (only >2pp mover). Gauntlet: PASS — clear to ship (regression 33/33; metamorphic INV[comma-drop] 9/10 held — the US '1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington DC' comma-free rooftop RESTORED, the FR 'Rue du Chevaleret' remains the tracked #1101 xfail; held-out FR/BAN n=300 not significantly worse). Digit ownership (NO board 3): bare-street-hn 0.693->0.733 (+4pp), bare-pc guard held 1.000. Grade: package-shaped --weights-cache (#718), int8 candidate vs int8 shipped, on 2026-07-17.

gate_2026_07_16_v640_fr_fragment.promotion_gate: v6.0.0-shipped-baseline gate: PASS 18/18, no revision, no relaxation. This spec was cut from the SHIPPED v264's own readings BEFORE v310 was graded, with per-metric noise margins (floor = shipped − max(1.0pp, 2 × the 95% binomial half-width)); it tightened 15 of 18 floors over the retired v5.3.0-family spec. The FR fragment board's targets and guards were pre-registered in the v3.1.0-fr-fragment config header and in baselines.json (profile fragment-fr-v264), registered against the shipped model before the run. 2pp pre-publish bar: clear on every tag. No trade was measured and none is claimed.
gate_docs: docs/articles/evals/2026-07-16-span-head-closed.md (the pre-registered follow-up: the span head does NOT compose with this shard)

fr_fragment_board.$note: Board 2 — BAN-sampled, 2800 fixtures, street surfaces disjoint from the training shard. Wilson 95% CIs. No target's interval overlaps its baseline.

bare_locality_counter_guard.$note: PRE-REGISTERED as the cell that might collapse by design. It held exactly, same interval — the model learned the distinction, not a new default.

global_parity_floor.$note: Board 1 — the guard. The FAIL verdicts eval parity prints on street/house_number are the v7 CAMPAIGN floors (0.90 / 0.97); shipped v264 fails them too. They are a target, not a regression gate.

gate_2026_07_16_v640_fr_fragment.known_open_not_addressed: Digit ownership — which tag owns a digit-bearing token (house_number vs postcode vs route number). Untouched by this shard and explicitly out of its scope. Parity PRECISION (new in this cycle — the half no floor could previously see, since every floor did `if (!goldValues?.length) continue`) reads postcode 25/249 = 0.100, street 12/54 = 0.222, house_number 6/175 = 0.034 emitted where the gold has none. v310 moves this by −1 row. Tracked as its own workstream; whether these become formal floors is an open operator decision.

gate_2026_07_04_v530_full_family.promotion_gate: v5.3.0-family gate (clone of v5.2.0-nordic + the fr.postcode 99.3→99.2 revision): PASS with the three operator-approved trades stated above. The promote decision ran on the 2026-07-03 RE-GATE of the archived candidate under the #942-floored stack — fresh dumps BOTH arms, same stack (the #942-D1 stack-drift lesson): 6/6 ni legs PASS; the SI wrong-city re-gate bar (≤+2pp) failed at +2.7pp and was adjudicated at the fork, not silently absorbed. Original 100k battery: 15/17 floors (the two above), mask-regression PASS, zero NaN.
gate_docs: #901 (the campaign + the promote fork), #949 (the FR fragmentation this fixes)
gate_2026_07_04_v530_full_family.ni_legs: US-2k p50 3.27 identical, resolve 1.000 both; FR-3k p50 1.30 identical (deconfounded same-stack); SE +4.6pp resolve; Abo 0.12km vs 859km

gate_2026_07_02_v510_vocab_splice.promotion_gate: #884 gates ALL PASS, pre-registered before measurement (gate log: /mnt/playpen/mailwoman-data/scratch-825/gate-v193/RESULTS.md; evidence comments on #884). US-2k non-inferiority passed at the strongest possible level — the int8 candidate's per-row dump is byte-identical to shipped v4.15.0's. CZ/PL/SK/SI improve gates: wrong-city diff CIs wholly negative, resolved-p50 improve CIs wholly negative, resolve-rate floors held. Functional eyeball: CZ churn (103 fixed / 43 newly-wrong) diagnosed as a pre-existing locality-truncation→namesake residual exposed where the baseline won by garbage-parse fluke — NOT a parse regression (10/10 rows read). The int8 SLO overage (+3.8 MB) was an explicit operator accept (four locales for the same bytes).

wrong_city_resolved_gt20km_n1k.$note: reservoir-sampled 1k-row OA coord sets (oa-{cz,pl,sk,si}-coord-1k.jsonl), graded parse→resolve→great-circle, int8 ship artifact

us_2k_non_inferiority.row_dump: BYTE-IDENTICAL to shipped v4.15.0 int8 (diff 0 everywhere)

gate_2026_07_02_v510_vocab_splice.tokenization_examples: Vysoká 4→1 piece, Grudziądz 6→1, Świętokrzyska 9→1, Čistá 5→2; SK fertility −51.9%, SI −35.2% on diacritic-bearing names with zero SK/SI-specific pieces

gate_2026_06_25_v415_anchor_absorption.promotion_gate: v4.15.0-boundary gate PASS after a stated, operator-approved revision of two postcode floors (us.postcode 97→95, fr.postcode 99.5→99.3). The #723 fix (SLICE-H anchor-ON 20→100) trades −2pp us.postcode LABEL-F1 on the rare leading-5-digit-postcode (VT E911) case. The trade is COORDINATE-INVISIBLE — proven by the non-circular oa-resolver-eval below, not asserted. Every other floor holds with margin (us.locality 76.7/62.2, us.street 82.3/74, us.region 88.6/80.1, de.native_locality 89.3/83.8, arena.perturb 78/71); mask-regression gate (#718) PASS; int8↔fp32 delta 0. No silent drift: the revision is in scripts/eval/gates/v4.15.0-boundary.json with the reason, mirrored here and in the promotion doc.

slice_h_anchor_on.$note: leading-5-digit house# correctly labeled house_number (not postcode) with the anchor ON — the #723 production bug

oa_resolver_eval_us.$note: non-circular: real OA gov lat/lon vs resolved admin centroid, full ship-config (anchor+gazetteer+suppress)

vt_locality_match.$note: VT = the E911 leading-postcode state where the postcode label trade lives — FLAT at the coordinate

label_deltas_coordinate_invisible: us.postcode -2.0 (95.0) — rare leading-5-digit-postcode VT E911 case; VT coordinate flat (92.6=92.6)

gate_2026_06_19_fr_admin_split.promotion_gate: FR centroid gate PASS — surpasses v1.5.0 on the SHIPPED assembled anchor-ON coordinate (held-out FR golden, 3000 disjoint communes): coord p50 42.5→2.2 km, mean 175→105.5 km (−40%), région-emit 39.6→99.6%. US assembled coordinate FLAT (oa-resolver-eval, 2000 OA-US rows: locality-match 97.5→97.6, p50 3.3=3.3). Two label deltas trip the 2pp pre-publish gate, BOTH coordinate-invisible and operator-approved (#728): us.locality −2.2 (precision-only, 0 recall misses) and fr.country −3.5 (resolver given --default-country FR). No silent drift — both stated here + on #728 + the night postmortem.
flagged_deltas_coordinate_invisible: us.locality -2.2 (precision-only — 0 recall misses, spurious-FP on gold-locality-absent rows)
fr.country -3.5 (resolver given --default-country FR, never reaches the coordinate; abandoned v1.8.1 country-shard targeted this)

per_component_int8_shipconfig.$comment: per-locale-f1 anchor-ON matched pair vs v1.5.0 (postmortem guardrail tables). The unfolded per-tag F1 (split affix, intersections, etc.) is the authoritative `capabilities` block below. Tags off the FR-shard path (us intersections/unit, de native_locality, arena.perturb) were not re-measured for v1.8.0 — the single training variable was the FR admin-split shard and the architecture is identical to v1.5.0.

vs_1_5_0.fr_coord_p50: 42.5 → 2.2 km (−95%) — the win; first model in the arc to beat v1.5.0 on the shipped coordinate

files_md5.$comment: Shipped: model.onnx = int8 v385-latam8k (v3.8.5-latam-8k, init_from v381); tokenizer v0.9.0-multisplice (UNCHANGED). md5 of the graded int8 artifact.

capabilities.$comment: Per-tier (server=anchor+gazetteer; pocket=anchor-only) × address-system × tag capability manifest (#718/#719). maskOffF1 = measured per-tag exact-match F1 with the conventions mask OFF; maskOnF1 = the same with mask ON (recorded only for tags some codex forbiddenTags row suppresses — the loader's delta-gate consults only those). createScorer FAILS CLOSED when a conventions row forbids a tag with maskOffF1 − maskOnF1 > 0.05 (the mask provably destroys a real capability). Generated by `mailwoman eval capability-manifest` against the v1.5.0 int8.
